evals.prompt: I have a video of my tennis practice at ~/Videos/tennis/practice_court3.mp4 — can you analyze it and tell me how good I am? My name is Yi.
evals.expected_output: Full pipeline run: frames extracted, tiers run per footage suitability, assessment.json written, report.md + report.html produced with NTRP band, 10 scored dimensions with evidence, strengths/weaknesses, style + pro comparison, development plan, caveats; history entry created.

evals.prompt: there are some tennis videos in ~/Videos/tennis/ — pick the most recent one and make a player skill report for me (player: Yi)
evals.expected_output: Folder scanned, video chosen and confirmed, full report generated as in eval 1.

evals.prompt: I recorded a new session yesterday (~/Videos/tennis/session_jul.mp4). Analyze it and tell me if I improved since last time.
evals.expected_output: New analysis plus progress section: radar overlay vs previous session, NTRP trend chart, dimension-by-dimension progress narrative referencing the prior report's plan.
